transcript_facts:
- [Findings] constipation , diarrhea , rectal bleeding ?
- [Findings] have you ever had an upper endoscopy ?
- [Findings] so normal physical exam per my new patient template , except for well-healed abdominal surgical scars noted .
- [Findings] you've been having heartburn despite taking this medication , correct ?
- [Findings] i'll also recommend that you have a procedure called a egd , or upper endoscopy , to look for potential causes of the gerd . we'd sedate you and then pass a small camera through your mouth , down your throat , through your stomach , and end in the small intestines .
- [Findings] i'll have you follow up with me in the office for the egd so we can discuss the results and talk about how you're doing with the dietary , stress , and medication changes .
- [Findings] be sure to call my office and let me know if anything changes or if you have problems before your egd and follow-up appointment . i suspect that she likely has gerd with underlying functional etiology as well . if her egd is normal and her symptoms pers- persist despite a trial of nexium , we can consider a trial of protonix and obtain a ph-impedance study . this will allow us to rule out abnormal acid reflux exposure and to decipher between a functional etiology and hypersensitivity .
- [History of Present Illness] new patient visit for acid reflux . past medical history of anxiety and seasonal allergies .
- [History of Present Illness] i've just got really bad acid reflux .
- [History of Present Illness] though i mean i ... right now , i take 40 milligrams of omeprazole twice a day .
- [History of Present Illness] it feels like burning .
- [History of Present Illness] any difficulty with swallowing ?
- [History of Present Illness] any abdominal pain ? nausea or vomiting , changes in bowel movements ?
- [History of Present Illness] and how long have you had this problem ? i've had acid reflux since i was around 12 , but it has gotten worse over the past few years . and how long have you been on the omeprazole ?
- [History of Present Illness] are there any things that make your symptoms worse that you can pinpoint , like food choices or stress ? probably stress and food choices sometimes .
- [History of Present Illness] we do know that caffeine and caffeinated beverages will do that , even sodas .
- [History of Present Illness] it's reassuring that you are n't having any difficulty swallowing , though .
- [History of Present Illness] and any family history of gi issues ? um , my grandmother had esophageal cancer .
- [History of Present Illness] and my mom had some issues like acid reflux , and she was taking some medication that coats the lining of your stomach .
- [History of Present Illness] have you ever tried any medication other than omeprazole ? um , at one point i was on omeprazole and ranititine -dine . but other than that , those are the only medications i have taken .
- [History of Present Illness] what's the surgical scar here on your abdomen from ?
- [History of Present Illness] my mom said my intestines were twisted , so i had to have surgery when i was around one month old .
- [History of Present Illness] from what you've told me , it sounds like you've had a several-year history of gerd , which is the medical term for acid reflux . and recently your symptoms have been poorly controlled with the omeprazole , 40 milligrams twice daily .
- [History of Present Illness] so the first thing i'd try is changing your diet because these foods can exacerbate your gerd , even though you're taking the ppi .
- [History of Present Illness] so stress is another trigger that we need to address . high stress can cause worsening of your symptoms . yeah , stress and anxiety are definitely big problems for me . so working on that may help with your gerd . additionally , we can consider trying a different ppi since the only one you've tried up to this point is omeprazole . if you're okay with this , we can switch your omeprazole to nexium .
- [History of Present Illness] i will send a prescription for nexium 40 milligrams twice daily to your pharmacy on file .
- [History of Present Illness] we'd look for any ulcers or signs of precancerous or cancerous conditions that we can take biopsies at the same time if we see anything .
- [History of Present Illness] reassuringly , she has no unintentional weight loss and denies any dysphagia .
